BSc (Hons) Computing.req: BBB or 120 UCAS tariff points from 3 A-levels. GCSE Mathematics grade B/5 and English Language grade C/4 required. No specific A-level subjects required.

BA (Hons) Business Management.req: BCC or 104 UCAS tariff points from 3 A-levels. GCSE Maths and English Language grade C/4. BTEC Extended Diploma at MMM or equivalent accepted.

BSc (Hons) Nursing (Adult).req: BBC or 112 UCAS tariff points. One science A-level preferred (Biology, Chemistry, or Health & Social Care). GCSE English Language and Maths at grade C/4. Relevant care experience required. Enhanced DBS check and Occupational Health assessment required.

LLB Law.req: ABB or 128 UCAS tariff points. No specific A-level subjects required; critical thinking or essay-based subjects preferred. GCSE English Language at grade B/5 or above.

BEng (Hons) Civil Engineering.req: BBB or 120 UCAS tariff points. Mathematics A-level required. Science A-level preferred. GCSE Mathematics at grade B/5.

BSc (Hons) Psychology.req: BBB or 120 UCAS tariff points. No specific A-level subjects required. GCSE English Language and Maths at grade C/4. Psychology, Biology, or Sociology A-level desirable.

BA (Hons) Marketing.req: BBC or 112 UCAS tariff points. No specific A-level subjects required. GCSE Maths and English Language at grade C/4.

BA (Hons) Education Studies.req: BCC or 104 UCAS tariff points. GCSE English Language and Maths at grade C/4. Experience in educational or community settings desirable.
